//: Copy this file to cairn.config.json and edit for your machine. cairn.config.json is git-ignored. 'cairn config init' writes this template (with your --data-root / --enable choices) to ~/.config/cairn/config.json.
//data_root: Directory under which each collection's exported markdown is written (one subfolder per collection). Conventionally a git-ignored .context/ so the repo stays shareable.
//qmd_binary: Path to the qmd executable, or just 'qmd' if it is on your PATH (use an absolute path if cron's minimal PATH can't find it).
//cron: Optional. Schedule for 'cairn sync --cron' as a standard 5-field crontab expression. Defaults to '7 * * * *' (hourly at minute 7) when omitted.
//collections: Each key is BOTH the QMD collection name AND the output subdirectory under data_root.
//sync: Per-collection sync policy (config-as-data). 'enabled' is the integration on/off switch the engine reads - disabled sources are skipped by 'cairn sync'. 'since' is the export window (today|yesterday|Nd|Nw|YYYY-MM-DD). 'on_hook' runs the source on the fast SessionEnd hook (default: Claude only). Omitting the whole block means enabled with a 1d window.

extra.description: Collection-level QMD context for all service docs.

service-docs.//service_sources: service name -> docs directory to mirror into the collection.

api.description: Describe this service for QMD context.

//path_resolution: Optional. Used to map agent project dirs to project/repo names. home_slug_prefixes is derived from your home dir if omitted.
//project_groups: Maps a directory-name prefix to its grouped project folder (e.g. worktrees -> parent repo). The optional key 'superset-worktrees' names the project that .superset worktrees belong to.
//repo_catalog: project group -> { repo name: description }. Drives repo subfolders and QMD context.
//project_descriptions: Top-level project -> human description, attached to QMD as context.
